name: Utility Bill
description: Electricity, gas, water, and phone bills from any provider.
instructions: Extract: provider name, customer name, customer account number, service address, billing period start, billing period end, meter reading previous, meter reading current, consumption (with unit, e.g. kWh or m³), unit price, fixed charges, total amount due, due date, payment method. Mark fields not present in the document as null.
